title: Radiant Mediterranean Lettuce Salad
description: A bright, sour, and light lettuce salad that showcases Mediterranean flavors with dehydrated sun‑dried tomatoes and a zesty lemon vinaigrette.
instructions: Tear romaine lettuce into bite‑size pieces and place in a large bowl.
Add dehydrated sun dried tomatoes, capers, chopped parsley, dried oregano, and dried basil to the bowl.
Whisk lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a small jar until emulsified, then pour over salad.
Toss salad until all greens are evenly coated and the lettuce begins to wilt slightly from the acidity.
Let the salad rest for 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Sprinkle extra fresh parsley on top for a burst of color.
Serve immediately on chilled plates for a crisp, refreshing dish.
Optionally, drizzle a thin ribbon of olive oil across the top before serving for visual flair.
